total.description: Total number of matching captains across all pages.

CaptainLocation.description:
A captain's last-known location row. The PostGIS `location` column is read as
`longitude` / `latitude` via `ST_X` / `ST_Y`; it is never mapped directly.

captain_id.description: Captain this location belongs to (matches the captain's user id).

last_ping_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent GPS ping that wrote this row.

latitude.description: WGS-84 latitude of the last-known position, in degrees.

longitude.description: WGS-84 longitude of the last-known position, in degrees.

online.description: Whether the captain is currently online and available for dispatch.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last write to this row (ping or online toggle).

CaptainLocationResponse.description: WS ping ACK and REST query response for a captain location.

captain_id.description: Captain this location belongs to (matches the captain's user id).

last_ping_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent GPS ping that updated this position.

latitude.description: WGS-84 latitude of the last-known position, in degrees.

longitude.description: WGS-84 longitude of the last-known position, in degrees.

online.description: Whether the captain is currently online and available for dispatch.

CaptainOffer.description:
A pending offer (regular trip or Abriyah room) visible to a captain.
Returned by `GET /api/captain/trip-queue`; women-only rooms are pre-filtered
out for non-female captains (G-ABRIYAH-02 / G-MF-06).

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the trip was requested or the room was created.

dropoff_lat.description:
WGS-84 dropoff latitude, in degrees. For rooms this is the representative
seed trip's dropoff.

dropoff_lng.description:
WGS-84 dropoff longitude, in degrees. For rooms this is the representative
seed trip's dropoff.

fare_iqd.description: Fare in integer IQD (no decimals). For rooms this is the seed trip's fare.

id.description:
Identifier of the underlying trip (when `offer_type` is `"trip"`) or room
(when `offer_type` is `"room"`).

offer_type.description:
Kind of offer: `"trip"` for a pending regular trip, `"room"` for an open
Abriyah room.

pickup_lat.description:
WGS-84 pickup latitude, in degrees. For rooms this is the representative
seed trip's pickup.

pickup_lng.description:
WGS-84 pickup longitude, in degrees. For rooms this is the representative
seed trip's pickup.

room_type.description:
Room privacy: `"mixed"` | `"women_only"` for rooms; null for regular
trips. Women-only rooms are pre-filtered out for non-female captains.

zone_id.description: Zone the offer originates in; null when the trip or room has no zone.

offers.description:
Pending offers (regular trips and Abriyah rooms) the captain may accept;
empty when none are available.

CaptainRow.description: Lightweight captain list row with an uploaded-document count, for admin listing tables.

approved_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of approval. Null until approved.

avg_rating.description: Average rider rating, 0.0-5.0 (0.0 before any rated trips).

cancellation_count.description: Lifetime count of trips this captain cancelled.

city_id.description: City this captain belongs to (FK to cities).

doc_count.description:
Count of all documents this captain has uploaded (plain COUNT(*) over
captain_documents, uncapped). Bounded by the UNIQUE(captain_id, doc_type)
constraint to at most 5: driver_license, car_registration, captain_selfie,
national_id_front, national_id_back.

CaptainTripSummary.description:
Rider-facing captain summary for a live trip. Deliberately omits the
captain's phone and any PII beyond what a rider needs to identify the car
and driver pulling up: name, vehicle details, rating, and trip count.

avg_rating.description: Average rider rating, 0.0-5.0 (0.0 before any rated trips).

car_color.description: Vehicle color. Null when not on file.

confirm_self_demotion.description: Required `true` when an actor demotes themselves.

role.description: New role: `super_admin` | `operator` | `finance`. Any other value is rejected.

City.description: A city the platform operates in (Baghdad, Erbil, Basra, Mosul, ...).

active.description: Whether the city is live for trips. False for cities seeded for future multi-city expansion that are not yet activated.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp, RFC3339.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for fares in this city (e.g. "IQD").

timezone.description: IANA timezone the city operates on (e.g. "Asia/Baghdad"); descriptive metadata only -- stored and echoed back but not read by any business logic. Daily semantics use a hardcoded Asia/Baghdad constant regardless of this value.

updated_at.description: Last-update timestamp, RFC3339.

CollectedRevenue.description:
Live collected-revenue summary over a date range, sourced from the
transaction ledger (status='succeeded'). Replaces the Phase 9 accrued view.

collected_activation_fees_iqd.description: Sum of succeeded daily activation-fee charges over the range, in integer IQD.

collected_fare_iqd.description: Sum of succeeded trip-fare charges over the range, in integer IQD.

net_iqd.description: Net collected revenue: fares + activation fees minus refunds, in integer IQD.

refunds_iqd.description: Sum of processed refunds over the range, in integer IQD.

CreateAdminUser.description:
Internal admin-creation shape consumed by `AdminAuthService::create_admin` and
`PgAdminUserRepository::create`. It is NOT the body of any live OpenAPI endpoint:
admin creation is exposed via `POST /api/admin/users` in the admin_ops domain,
which consumes `InviteAdminRequest` (the legacy create handler was removed).

email.description: Login email for the new admin. The `admin_users_email_unique` DB constraint rejects duplicates.

name.description: Display name for the new admin.

role.description: Access tier to grant: one of "super_admin" | "operator" | "finance".

CreateCity.description: Request body to create a city (POST /api/admin/cities).

active.description: Whether the city is live for trips on creation. Null defaults to true.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for fares. Null defaults to "IQD".

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the city. Null defaults to "Asia/Baghdad".

CreatePaymentMethod.description: Request body to register a new saved payment method.

card_number.description:
Raw card number; the service extracts last 4 and tokenizes, storing only
the gateway token. Never logged. Required for `method_type` "card"; null otherwise.

set_as_default.description:
If true, mark this method as the owner's default. Null/false leaves the
current default unchanged.

CreateRatingDto.description: Request body to leave a rating on a trip.

comment.description: Optional free-text comment. Null when omitted.

CreateRefund.description: Request body to open a refund against an existing transaction.

amount_iqd.description:
Amount to refund in integer IQD (no decimals); must be positive and not
exceed the original transaction amount.

transaction_id.description: Transaction to refund; must reference an existing, refundable transaction.

CreateScheduledTrip.description: Request body to book a scheduled trip.

dropoff_address.description: Optional human-readable dropoff address; omit to send coordinates only.

dropoff_lat.description: Dropoff latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

dropoff_lng.description: Dropoff longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

pickup_address.description: Optional human-readable pickup address; omit to send coordinates only.

pickup_lat.description: Pickup latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

pickup_lng.description: Pickup longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

scheduled_for.description: RFC3339 timestamp (UTC); must be between 30 minutes and 7 days from now, else 400.

trip_type.description: Kind of trip to create on promotion; must be "regular" (any other value is rejected 400).

CreateZone.description: Request body for creating a service zone (POST /api/admin/zones).

abriyah_base_fare_iqd.description: Abriyah flat base fare in integer IQD. Defaults to the settings value (or 0) when omitted.

abriyah_per_km_iqd.description: Abriyah per-kilometer fare in integer IQD. Defaults to the settings value when omitted; must resolve to > 0 for abriyah_enabled zones. Forced to null for regular_only zones.

active.description: Whether the zone is created active. Defaults to true when omitted.

allow_women_only.description: Whether to permit women-only Abriyah rooms. Defaults to true when omitted.

city_id.description: City the new zone belongs to; must reference an existing city or the request is rejected.

polygon_wkt.description: Zone boundary as WKT, longitude first, SRID 4326: `POLYGON((lng lat, ...))`. Must be a closed, valid (non-self-intersecting) polygon or the request is rejected.

room_max_riders.description: Maximum riders per Abriyah room. Defaults to the settings value (or 4) when omitted.

room_max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum room-open seconds before expiry. Defaults to the settings value (or 300) when omitted.

avg_rating_given.description: Average stars this rider gave to captains; null with no ratings given yet.

avg_rating_received.description: Average stars this rider received from captains; null with no ratings yet.

blocked.description: True if the customer is currently blocked from booking.

blocked_reason.description: Reason recorded when the customer was blocked; null when not blocked.

cancellation_count.description: Lifetime count of trips this rider cancelled.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the account was created.

name.description: Display name; null when the rider has not set one.

total_trips.description: Lifetime count of trips this rider requested.

CustomerList.description: Customer list wrapper with pagination metadata.

items.description: Customer rows for the requested page.

page.description: 1-based page number echoed from the request.

per_page.description: Page size echoed from the request.

CustomerRow.description: A customer row for the All-Customers directory.

blocked.description: True if the customer is currently blocked from booking.

cancellation_count.description: Lifetime count of trips this rider cancelled.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the account was created.

name.description: Display name; null when the rider has not set one.

total_trips.description: Lifetime count of trips this rider requested.

activated_captain_count.description: Captains who activated (paid the daily fee) in the bucket.

activation_rate_pct.description: Activation rate: activated / approved as a percentage, 0-100; derived in SQL.

approved_captain_count.description:
Approved captains in the city at snapshot time (absolute COUNT, refreshed
on each event -- not a running sum).

city_name.description: Human-readable city name; null if the city was deleted.

id.description: Unique identifier of this rollup row.

period_start.description: First calendar day of the bucket (Asia/Baghdad).

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last upsert into this row.

item_id.description: Identifier of the item to dismiss for the calling admin.

item_type.description: Tab the item belongs to: `flagged_trip` | `expired_room` | `stuck_item`. Any other value is rejected with 400.

DocumentCompletenessResponse.description: Document-upload completeness for a captain (drives the approval gate).

complete.description: True when every required document type has been uploaded; approval is blocked until then.

uploaded.description: Every document type the captain has uploaded (not filtered to the required set).

DocumentViewResponse.description: A short-lived presigned GET URL for an admin to view a stored document.

view_url.description: Presigned GET URL (short-lived). Open to view the image.

EarningsHistoryItem.description: One completed-trip line in a captain's earnings history.

fare_iqd.description: Fare earned for this trip in integer IQD (no decimals).

trip_id.description: Trip that produced this earnings line.

EarningsHistoryResponse.description: A captain's itemised completed-trip earnings over a rolling period.

items.description: Completed-trip earnings lines within the window.

EarningsSummaryResponse.description: Captain earnings summary over a rolling period, net of the activation fee.

activation_fee_iqd.description: Flat activation fee subtracted from gross in integer IQD; 0 when gross is not positive. Exact for "today"; illustrative (a single fee, not per-day) over week/month in v1.

gross_iqd.description: Sum of completed-trip fares since the period start, in integer IQD.

net_iqd.description: Gross minus the activation fee, in integer IQD.

trip_count.description: Number of completed trips counted in the window.

ExpiredRoomRow.description: Needs-Action Tab 3: a recently expired room.

expired_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the room expired (derived from the expiry sweep's update time).

opened_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the room was opened.

rider_count_at_expiry.description: Number of riders in the room when it expired.

FareEstimateResponse.description: Pre-request fare estimate computed without persisting a trip.

base_fare_iqd.description: Flat base fare component in integer IQD, before the per-km charge.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code; always "IQD" in v1.

fare_iqd.description: Estimated total fare in integer IQD (no decimals).

FlaggedTripRow.description: Needs-Action Tab 2: a flagged trip (long-running, late cancel, or low rating).

avg_stars.description: Average star rating for the trip; only populated for the low-rating flag, otherwise null.

captain_name.description: Assigned captain's name; null if no captain was ever assigned.

flag_reason.description: Why the trip was flagged: `In-progress over 2 hours` | `Cancelled: captain late` | `Low rating`.

requested_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the trip was requested.

status_duration_min.description: Minutes elapsed since the trip was requested.

zone_name.description: Pickup zone name; null if the trip has no zone.

ForceActionRequest.description: Body for force-cancel (reason validated against the cancellation_reason enum).

reason.description: Cancellation reason; must be a valid value from the `cancellation_reason` enum.

gender.description: New gender to set on the customer: `m` | `f` | `unset`.

HealthResponse.description: Liveness payload returned by the process-level health probe.

status.description: Always the literal "ok" while the process is running.

version.description: Running server build, taken from the `beeb` crate version (semver).

email.description: Email for the new admin; must be unique (409 on collision) and is lowercased.

name.description: Display name for the new admin.

role.description: Role to grant: `super_admin` | `operator` | `finance`. Any other value is rejected.

send_invite.description:
When false, create the admin in `invited` status without sending the
invite email (it can be sent later via resend-invite). Defaults true.

JoinRoomRequest.description: Request to join (or open) an Abriyah shared-ride room for a rider.

pickup_lat.description: Pickup latitude (WGS84 decimal degrees); must fall inside an active zone polygon.

pickup_lng.description: Pickup longitude (WGS84 decimal degrees); must fall inside an active zone polygon.

room_type.description: Requested pool gender policy: "mixed" or "women_only"; "women_only" requires the rider to be a woman and the zone to allow it.

JoinRoomResponse.description: Result of joining a room: the room state, the rider's new seat, and the matched trip.

distance_km.description: This rider's pickup-to-dropoff distance in kilometers.

fare_iqd.description: This rider's individual fare in integer IQD (no decimals).

member.description: The rider's newly created membership (seat) in the room.

room.description: The room the rider joined, re-fetched after any auto-dispatch so its status is current.

trip_id.description: The Abriyah trip created and linked for this rider.

KpiSnapshot.description: KPI snapshot (8 dashboard cards + yesterday deltas), computed in one query.

activation_fees_accrued_iqd.description: Total activation fees accrued today, in integer IQD.

activations_today.description: Captain daily activations recorded today (Asia/Baghdad calendar day).

active_captains_now.description: Captains currently online (`captain_locations.online = TRUE`). Counts every online captain regardless of daily activation; not an activated-only count.

active_trips_now.description: Trips currently in a live state (requested, matched, accepted, or in_progress).

cancelled_today.description: Trips that were cancelled today (Asia/Baghdad calendar day).

completed_today.description: Trips that completed today (Asia/Baghdad calendar day).

completed_yesterday.description: Trips completed yesterday, for the day-over-day delta on the dashboard card.

open_rooms_now.description: Abriyah rooms currently open or locked.

trips_yesterday.description: Trips requested yesterday, for the day-over-day delta on the dashboard card.

LiveRoomCard.description: A live room card for the Operations Kanban.

captain_name.description: Assigned captain's name; null while no captain is dispatched.

max_riders.description: Maximum riders the room can hold.

max_wait_sec.description: Zone-configured max wait in seconds before the room expires.

opened_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the room was opened.

rider_count.description: Number of riders currently in the room.

wait_elapsed_sec.description: Seconds elapsed since the room opened.

LiveTripPin.description: A live trip pin for the Operations map.

captain_lat.description: Captain's last-known WGS84 latitude; null if no location ping is on file.

captain_lng.description: Captain's last-known WGS84 longitude; null if no location ping is on file.

captain_name.description: Assigned captain's name; null while the trip is unassigned.

captain_phone.description: Assigned captain's phone; null while the trip is unassigned.

requested_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the trip was requested.

rider_count.description: Number of riders on the trip (at least 1; counts room members for Abriyah).

status_duration_min.description: Minutes elapsed since the trip was requested.

zone_name.description: Pickup zone name; null if the trip has no zone.

LocationPingInput.description: Body for `POST /api/captain/location`: a single GPS ping.

MessageResponse.description: A simple human-readable acknowledgement for actions with no resource body.

message.description: Human-readable status message describing the action's outcome.

NeedsActionCounts.description: Badge counts for the 4 Needs-Action tabs.

any_sla_breach.description: True if any pending captain has waited > 24h.

expired_rooms.description: Rooms that expired in the last 24h and are not yet dismissed (Tab 3 badge count).

flagged_trips.description: Flagged trips not yet dismissed by this admin (Tab 2 badge count).

stuck_items.description: Stuck items not yet dismissed by this admin (Tab 4 badge count).

NotificationLog.description: Delivery record for an FCM push or SMS attempt. Retention 90 days.

NotificationType.description:
Category of a push notification the platform sends to a rider or captain.

Serialized in snake_case and persisted to `notification_log.notification_type`.
Allowed values: `trip_accepted` | `captain_arriving` | `trip_completed` |
`trip_cancelled` | `room_dispatched` | `room_expired` |
`captain_approval_decision` | `new_trip_in_queue`.

OfflinePingFlushInput.description:
Body for `POST /api/captain/location/flush`: ordered pings collected while the
captain app was offline. The backend stores only the last one (last-known
interpolation policy).

pings.description:
GPS pings buffered while offline, in chronological order (oldest first).
Must be non-empty; an empty array is rejected with 400. Only the last
entry is persisted as the new last-known position.

OkResponse.description:
An empty success body for endpoints that only return a status (e.g. online
toggle), so Swagger shows a concrete schema.

OnlineToggleInput.description: Body for `PUT /api/captain/online`: toggle the captain's online state.

online.description:
Desired availability: `true` to go online (subject to the daily
activation gate), `false` to go offline.

PaymentMethod.description: A saved payment instrument for a rider or captain. The gateway token is never exposed.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp (RFC3339).

is_default.description: True if this is the owner's default method used when none is specified.

masked_last4.description: Last 4 digits of the card for display. Null for non-card methods such as wallet.

owner_id.description: Identifier of the rider or captain that owns this method.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last change, e.g. when the default flag was toggled (RFC3339).

PendingCaptainRow.description: Needs-Action Tab 1: a captain awaiting approval.

documents_complete.description: True when at least 5 documents have been uploaded (the approval requirement).

sla_breached.description: True when `age_hours` exceeds the 24h approval SLA.

PresignedUploadResponse.description:
Presigned upload target. The client PUTs the raw image bytes to `upload_url`
(direct to storage, NOT through the API), then submits `object_key` back to
`POST .../documents`.

object_key.description: The object key to submit when persisting the document.

upload_url.description: Presigned PUT URL (short-lived). PUT the image bytes here directly.

PricingUpdateResult.description: Result of a pricing change, pairing the updated zone with how many active trips were re-priced.

in_flight_trips_locked.description: Count of non-terminal trips in this zone (status NOT IN 'completed','cancelled') at the time of the change. The handler only counts these trips; it does not lock or re-price any of them.

zone.description: The zone after the pricing/room fields were applied.

ProxySession.description: A masked phone-proxy session that hides the rider's and captain's real numbers for a single live trip.

captain_proxy_number.description: Masked number the captain dials to reach the rider; the rider's real phone is never exposed.

created_at.description: When this session row was first inserted (RFC3339); preserved across in-place re-allocations of an expired session.

expires_at.description: When the masking expires (RFC3339); 2 hours after allocation. A read after this re-allocates the masking in place, refreshing the numbers and this `expires_at` on the same row.

provider.description: Number-proxy provider that allocated the masking, e.g. "mock" in the current build.

provider_session_id.description: Provider-side session handle for releasing the masking; null when the provider returns none.

rider_proxy_number.description: Masked number the rider dials to reach the captain; the captain's real phone is never exposed.

trip_id.description: The trip this session masks; one active session per trip.

Rating.description:
A star rating left for one party on a trip.

Exactly one of `by_user_id`/`by_captain_id` identifies the rater and exactly
one of `of_user_id`/`of_captain_id` identifies the ratee (enforced by DB
CHECKs). A rating becomes read-only once locked.

by_captain_id.description: Rater when a captain left the rating. Set iff the rater is a captain; null when a rider rated.

by_user_id.description: Rater when a rider left the rating. Set iff the rater is a rider; null when a captain rated.

comment.description: Optional free-text comment. Null when none was provided.

created_at.description: When the rating was created (RFC3339).

locked_at.description: When the rating became read-only (RFC3339). Set to the sweep time (`NOW()`) by `RatingRepository::lock_expired`, which only affects rows older than 7 days; the value is therefore at or after `created_at` + 7 days, not exactly `created_at` + 7 days. No scheduler invokes this sweep in the running service, so in practice this stays null until `lock_expired` is run explicitly.

of_captain_id.description: Ratee when the rated party is a captain. Set iff the rider rated the captain; otherwise null.

of_user_id.description: Ratee when the rated party is a rider. Set iff the captain rated the rider; otherwise null.

updated_at.description: Last modification timestamp (RFC3339).

RatingsForTripResponse.description: All ratings recorded for a single trip.

items.description: Ratings left on the trip (rider-to-captain and/or captain-to-rider).

ReachStop.description: Request body for the captain to mark a pending stop reached.

reached_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp (UTC) the stop was reached; null defaults to the server time at the call.

ReadinessResponse.description: Readiness payload reporting whether each backing dependency is reachable.

status.description: "ready" when both database and Redis responded; "not_ready" otherwise.

Refund.description: A refund request against a prior transaction and its review lifecycle.

amount_iqd.description: Amount to refund in integer IQD (no decimals); always positive.

created_at.description: Request creation timestamp (RFC3339).

processed_at.description: Timestamp the refund money movement was applied (RFC3339). Null until "processed".

reason.description: Free-text reason supplied when the refund was requested.

refunded_by.description: Admin who reviewed the refund. Null while still "pending".

rejection_note.description: Admin note explaining a rejection. Null unless `status` is "rejected".

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last status change (RFC3339).

RegisterCaptainRequest.description: Self-service captain registration payload (Captain App). Creates a pending captain.

car_plate.description: Vehicle license plate. Must not already be registered (else 409).

city_id.description: City this captain belongs to. Must reference an existing city (else 404).

gender.description:
Gender. Allowed values: "m" | "f"; any other value is rejected. Set at
creation; this domain exposes no update endpoint, so it is not changed afterward.

phone.description:
Phone number. Normalized server-side (leading `+` stripped); must be 10-15 digits.
Must not already be registered (else 409).

RejectCaptainRequest.description: Reject a pending captain, recording a reason code and optional note.

comment.description: Optional free-text note shown to the captain. Null when no note is supplied.

reason.description:
Rejection reason code. Allowed values: "documents_invalid" | "vehicle_unfit" |
"identity_mismatch" | "existing_account" | "other". Any other value is rejected.

ReportQuery.description:
Query params accepted by every report endpoint (a superset; each handler
uses the fields relevant to its report).

city_id.description:
Restrict to a single city; omit for all cities. Applies to city-scoped
reports only.

export.description: "csv" to download a CSV file; omit for JSON.

from.description: Inclusive start date of the range (Asia/Baghdad calendar day). Required.

limit.description: Captain leaderboard top-N (defaults to 50, capped at 500).

room_type.description: Trip Volume only: "mixed" | "women_only" to filter Abriyah rows.

to.description: Inclusive end date of the range (Asia/Baghdad calendar day). Required.

zone_id.description:
Restrict to a single zone; omit for all zones. Applies to zone-scoped
reports only.

RequestTripDto.description: Request body to create a new regular trip.

zone_id.description: Optional zone for zone-specific pricing. Omit for the city default rate.

RequestUploadUrlRequest.description: Request a presigned PUT URL to upload one document directly to storage.

abriyah_fare_iqd.description: Portion of revenue from Abriyah trips, in integer IQD.

id.description: Unique identifier of this rollup row.

period_start.description: First calendar day of the bucket (Asia/Baghdad).

regular_fare_iqd.description: Portion of revenue from regular trips, in integer IQD.

total_fare_iqd.description: Total completed-trip revenue, in integer IQD (regular + abriyah).

trip_count.description: Completed trips that contributed revenue in the bucket.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last upsert into this row.

zone_id.description: The zone this revenue is attributed to.

zone_name.description: Human-readable zone name; null if the zone was deleted.

ReviewRefund.description: Request body for an admin to approve or reject a pending refund.

approved.description: True to approve and process the refund; false to reject it.

rejection_note.description: Note explaining a rejection. Null when `approved` is true; expected when false.

Room.description:
An Abriyah room: a zone-scoped shared-ride pool that fills with riders until
`max_riders` or a captain accepts, then dispatches.

captain_id.description: Accepting captain; null while the room is "open" and no captain has accepted yet.

created_at.description: RFC3339 creation timestamp.

dispatched_at.description: RFC3339 instant the room was dispatched to its captain; null until status becomes "dispatched".

expires_at.description: RFC3339 instant when an undispatched "open" room expires; derived from the zone's room_max_wait_seconds.

max_riders.description: Maximum riders the pool holds before it is full; sourced from the zone's room_max_riders setting.

rider_count.description: Current number of riders that have joined this room.

room_type.description: Pool gender policy: "mixed" (any rider) or "women_only" (women riders, women captain only).

status.description: Lifecycle state: "open" (accepting riders), "locked" (a captain has accepted, awaiting fill/dispatch), "dispatched" (trip in progress), or "expired" (the wait window elapsed before dispatch).

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last mutation (status change, member join, captain accept).

zone_id.description: Zone this room is scoped to; all members share the zone's Abriyah pricing and rules.

RoomDetailResponse.description: A room together with its current member seats.

members.description: The seats currently in the room, in join order.

room.description: The room and its lifecycle state.

items.description: The matching rooms; empty when none match.

RoomMember.description:
A rider's seat in a room. `pickup`/`dropoff` GEOGRAPHY columns are not mapped
here (read separately as WKT where needed -- see RoomMemberDetail).

distance_km.description: This rider's pickup-to-dropoff distance in kilometers.

fare_iqd.description: This rider's individual fare in integer IQD (no decimals); independent of other members.

joined_at.description: RFC3339 instant the rider joined the room.

trip_id.description: Abriyah trip created for this rider; null briefly between insert and trip linking, otherwise set to the rider's matched trip.

RoomMemberDetail.description: Per-member detail for the captain's mid-trip rider list (joins users).

distance_km.description: This rider's pickup-to-dropoff distance in kilometers.

dropoff_wkt.description: Dropoff point as WKT (lng-first, SRID 4326), e.g. "POINT(44.4009 33.3406)".

fare_iqd.description: This rider's individual fare in integer IQD (no decimals).

joined_at.description: RFC3339 instant the rider joined the room.

name.description: Rider's display name; null when the rider has not set one.

phone.description:
Rider's real phone number, exposed unmasked to the assigned captain. This is the raw
`users.phone` value and is NOT proxied here; per-trip proxy masking is a separate
mechanism served only by `GET /api/rider/trips/{id}/proxy` (Privacy domain).

pickup_wkt.description: Pickup point as WKT (lng-first, SRID 4326), e.g. "POINT(44.3661 33.3152)".

RoomMembersResponse.description: A captain-facing rider roster for one room, with per-rider pickup/dropoff detail.

members.description: Per-rider detail (name, phone, WKT points, fare); empty when the room has no members.

room_id.description: The room the roster belongs to.

ScheduledTrip.description: A rider's intent to take a future trip, promoted into a live trip by the scheduler when due.

cancellation_reason.description: Reason captured at cancellation; null unless status is "cancelled".

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the scheduled trip was booked.

dropoff_address.description: Human-readable dropoff address; null when the rider supplied only coordinates.

dropoff_lat.description: Dropoff latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

dropoff_lng.description: Dropoff longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

pickup_address.description: Human-readable pickup address; null when the rider supplied only coordinates.

pickup_lat.description: Pickup latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

pickup_lng.description: Pickup longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

promoted_trip_id.description: Id of the live trip created on promotion; null until status is "promoted".

rider_id.description: Rider who booked this scheduled trip; set from the JWT at creation.

scheduled_for.description: RFC3339 timestamp (UTC) when the trip should be promoted to a live request.

trip_type.description: Kind of trip to create on promotion. Always "regular" (Abriyah cannot be scheduled).

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last status or detail change.

SearchResponse.description: Search response wrapper returned by the admin Search Command Center.

query.description:
The trimmed search term. Leading/trailing whitespace is stripped; an
empty or whitespace-only input yields an empty string (not the raw
submitted value), with no DB hit.

results.description:
Matched rows across all entity domains. Ordered by fixed entity priority
(captain > user > trip > zone > room), then by recency within each
entity (newest first), then truncated to 50. Not ranked by relevance.

total.description: Number of rows in `results` (the size of this response, not a global match count).

SearchResult.description:
One result row in the admin Search Command Center. `url_path` is the Admin
Dashboard deep-link the front end navigates to on selection.

id.description: Identifier of the matched entity, used to build the deep-link in `url_path`.

kind.description: Entity domain this hit belongs to. One of: `captain` | `user` | `trip` | `zone` | `room`.

label.description: Human-readable label for the command palette.

sublabel.description:
Secondary line (e.g. phone, status). Always populated in practice:
every producer sets it (captain "phone - status", user phone, trip
"type - status", zone Arabic name, room "status - zone"); no code path
yields null.

url_path.description:
Admin Dashboard deep-link path. Shape varies by `kind`, NOT always
`/<kind>/{id}`: captain -> `/captains/{id}`, user -> `/customers/{id}`
(note: not `/users/`), trip -> `/operations/trips/{id}`, zone ->
`/zones/{id}`, room -> `/operations/rooms/{id}`.

phone.description: International phone, with or without leading '+', 10-15 digits.

SetFcmTokenRequest.description: POST /api/me/fcm-token body. Registers the caller's device for push.

fcm_token.description: FCM device registration token. Send `null`/omit to clear (logout).

key.description: Setting key (unique config name, e.g. activation fee or surge multiplier).

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last edit.

updated_by.description: Admin user who last changed this value; null if never edited since seed.

value.description: Current value, stored as text and parsed per key by the service layer.

SettingsList.description: List wrapper for the settings endpoint.

StuckItemRow.description: Needs-Action Tab 4: a stuck item (idle captain, no-ping trip, locked room).

id.description: Identifier of the stuck captain, trip, or room (per `item_type`).

last_event_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last relevant event for this item.

related_label.description: Display label: captain name, captain name or short trip id, or zone name.

stuck_duration_min.description: Minutes the item has been stuck (since last ping, last update, or past expiry).

TopupRequest.description: Request body to add funds to a wallet, either via a saved card or an admin credit.

amount_iqd.description: Amount to add in integer IQD (no decimals); must be positive.

payment_method_id.description: Saved payment method to charge. Null on an admin credit (no gateway charge).

Transaction.description: A single immutable entry in the money-movement ledger.

activation_id.description:
Activation this movement relates to. Set when `tx_type` is "daily_fee" and for
a "refund" that reverses a "daily_fee" charge (it copies the original
transaction's `activation_id`). Null otherwise.

amount_iqd.description: Movement amount in integer IQD (no decimals); always positive.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp (RFC3339).

failure_reason.description: Human-readable failure cause. Null unless `status` is "failed".

gateway_ref.description: External payment-gateway reference. Null until the gateway returns one.

trip_id.description:
Trip this movement relates to. Set for trip-related charges ("trip_fare",
"cancellation_penalty") and for a "refund" that reverses such a charge (it
copies the original transaction's `trip_id`). Null otherwise.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last status change (RFC3339).

wallet_id.description:
Wallet this movement debits or credits. Null when the movement is not
wallet-backed (e.g. a direct gateway charge).

Trip.description:
A regular or Abriyah trip and its full lifecycle state, fares, and coordinates.

The PostGIS `pickup_point`/`dropoff_point` GEOGRAPHY generated columns are
intentionally not exposed here (not SQLx-decodable); the lat/lng fields carry
the coordinates. `fare_per_rider_iqd`/`distance_per_rider_km` are JSONB maps
keyed by rider id, populated at completion.

accepted_at.description: When a captain accepted (RFC3339). Null while still requested/matched or if never accepted.

base_fare_iqd.description: Flat base fare component in integer IQD, before the per-km charge.

cancellation_comment.description: Free-text note accompanying the cancellation. Null unless cancelled (and may still be null when no note was given).

cancellation_reason.description: Reason code when cancelled: "changed_mind" | "wait_too_long" | "wrong_pickup" | "captain_late" | "safety" | "system_timeout" | "captain_blocked" | "other". Null unless the trip was cancelled.

cancelled_at.description: When the trip was cancelled (RFC3339). Null unless the trip is "cancelled".

cancelled_by.description: Who cancelled: "rider" | "captain" | "system" | "admin". Null unless the trip was cancelled.

captain_id.description: Captain assigned to the trip. Null until a captain accepts; stays set after completion or cancellation.

completed_at.description: When the trip completed (RFC3339). Null until the trip reaches "completed".

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code; always "IQD" in v1 (reserved for multi-currency).

distance_per_rider_km.description: Per-rider distance breakdown in kilometres, a JSON map keyed by rider id. Null until the trip completes; one entry for regular, one per member for Abriyah.

fare_iqd.description: Total fare in integer IQD (no decimals).

fare_per_rider_iqd.description: Per-rider fare breakdown in integer IQD, a JSON map keyed by rider id. Null until the trip completes; one entry for regular, one per member for Abriyah.

room_id.description: Abriyah shared room this trip is a member of. Null for regular trips.

started_at.description: When the captain started the ride (RFC3339). Null until the trip enters "in_progress".

trip_type.description: Trip kind: "regular" (single rider) or "abriyah" (women-only shared room).

updated_at.description: Last modification timestamp (RFC3339).

version.description: Optimistic-lock version; incremented on each state change. Stale values cause a 409 conflict.

zone_id.description: Pricing/dispatch zone the trip belongs to. Null when the city default rate applies (no zone given).

TripExportRow.description:
One exported trip row. `fare_iqd` and `distance_km` are NOT NULL in the
schema (default 0), so they are non-optional here; `captain_id`, `zone_id`,
and `completed_at` are nullable.

captain_id.description: Assigned captain; null until a captain is matched/accepts, or if the trip was cancelled before assignment.

completed_at.description: Time the trip was completed (RFC3339, UTC); null until the trip reaches `completed`.

created_at.description: Time the trip was requested (RFC3339, UTC); sourced from the trip's `requested_at` column.

distance_km.description: Trip distance in kilometers. NOT NULL in the schema; defaults to 0.

fare_iqd.description: Trip fare in integer IQD (no decimals). NOT NULL in the schema; defaults to 0.

zone_id.description: Zone the trip belongs to; null when the trip has no zone association.

page.description: 1-based page number of this result set.

per_page.description: Maximum number of trips returned per page.

total.description: Total number of trips matching the query across all pages.

TripStop.description: A single intermediate waypoint on a regular trip, in visit order.

address.description: Human-readable stop address; null when only coordinates were supplied.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the stop was added.

lat.description: Stop latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

lng.description: Stop longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

reached_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the captain marked the stop reached; null while "pending".

seq.description: Visit order, starting at 1 and unique per trip; up to 3 stops per trip.

trip_id.description: Live trip this stop belongs to.

TripVolumeRow.description: Report 1 -- Trip Volume per zone and trip type (and Abriyah room type).

avg_fare_iqd.description:
Average fare per completed trip, in integer IQD; derived in SQL from the
accumulated totals.

completed.description: Trips that reached the completed state.

id.description: Unique identifier of this rollup row.

period_start.description:
First calendar day of the bucket (Asia/Baghdad). For "day" it is the day
itself; for "week"/"month" it is the period's starting date.

room_type.description:
Abriyah room type when `trip_type` is "abriyah": "mixed" | "women_only";
"n/a" for regular trips.

total_fare_iqd.description: Sum of fares across completed trips, in integer IQD (no decimals).

total_trips.description: Total trips in the bucket (completed + cancelled).

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last upsert into this row.

zone_id.description: Zone this row aggregates; null for trips with no zone assigned.

zone_name.description: Human-readable zone name; null when `zone_id` is null or the zone was deleted.

UpdateAdminUser.description: Partial-update body for an admin account (PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}); omitted fields are left unchanged.

disabled.description: New disabled flag (true deactivates, false reactivates); null/omitted leaves the current state unchanged.

name.description: New display name; null/omitted leaves the existing name unchanged.

role.description: New access tier ("super_admin" | "operator" | "finance"); null/omitted leaves the existing role unchanged.

UpdateCity.description: Request body to update a city; all fields optional for partial update (PUT /api/admin/cities/{id}).

active.description: New live/inactive flag; toggles whether the city is open for trips. Null leaves the existing flag unchanged.

currency.description: New ISO 4217 currency code. Null leaves the existing currency unchanged.

name.description: New English name. Null leaves the existing name unchanged.

name_ar.description: New Arabic name. Null leaves the existing Arabic name unchanged.

timezone.description: New IANA timezone. Null leaves the existing timezone unchanged.

UpdatePaymentMethod.description: Request body to update a saved payment method (only the default flag is mutable).

set_as_default.description: If true, promote this method to the owner's default. Null leaves it unchanged.

UpdateRatingDto.description: Request body to edit an existing rating (partial update).

comment.description: New free-text comment. Null leaves the existing comment unchanged.

stars.description: New score from 1 to 5 stars. Null leaves the existing score unchanged.

UpdateScheduledTrip.description: Partial-update body for a pending scheduled trip; only supplied fields change. The trip must still be "pending".

dropoff_address.description: New dropoff address; null leaves it unchanged.

dropoff_lat.description: New dropoff latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees; null leaves it unchanged.

dropoff_lng.description: New dropoff longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees; null leaves it unchanged.

pickup_address.description: New pickup address; null leaves it unchanged.

pickup_lat.description: New pickup latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees; null leaves it unchanged.

pickup_lng.description: New pickup longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees; null leaves it unchanged.

scheduled_for.description: New RFC3339 promotion time (UTC); when present, must be 30 minutes to 7 days from now, else 400. Null leaves the time unchanged.

value.description: New value; validated and range-checked per key in the service layer.

UpdateUserProfile.description:
Request body for PATCH /api/riders/me. Every field is optional; omitted fields are
left unchanged (partial update).

gender.description: New gender: "m" | "f" | "unset". Omit to leave the existing value unchanged.

name.description: New display name. Omit to leave the existing name unchanged.

photo_url.description:
New avatar reference. Omit to leave the existing photo unchanged. Either
the `object_key` returned by `POST /api/riders/me/photo/upload-url` after
the client PUT the image to the presigned URL (preferred; served back as
a short-lived presigned GET on read), or a full HTTPS URL (bring-your-own).

UpdateZone.description: Partial-update body for a zone (PUT /api/admin/zones/{id}). Every field is optional; omitted fields keep their current value.

abriyah_base_fare_iqd.description: New Abriyah flat base fare in integer IQD. Omit to leave unchanged.

abriyah_per_km_iqd.description: New Abriyah per-kilometer fare in integer IQD. When the resulting type is abriyah_enabled, the effective rate (this value or the existing one) must be > 0. Omit to leave unchanged.

active.description: New active flag. Omit to leave unchanged.

allow_women_only.description: New women-only permission flag. Omit to leave unchanged.

name.description: New zone name (English/Latin). Omit to leave unchanged.

name_ar.description: New zone name in Arabic. Omit to leave unchanged.

polygon_wkt.description: New boundary as WKT, longitude first, SRID 4326. Must be a closed, valid polygon when supplied. Omit to leave unchanged.

room_max_riders.description: New maximum riders per Abriyah room. Omit to leave unchanged.

room_max_wait_seconds.description: New maximum room-open seconds before expiry. Omit to leave unchanged.

zone_type.description: New service type; when supplied must be "regular_only" or "abriyah_enabled". Omit to leave unchanged.

UpdateZonePricing.description: Pricing/room-only partial-update body (PUT /api/admin/zones/{id}/pricing). Omitted fields keep their current value; geometry and identity are not touched.

abriyah_base_fare_iqd.description: New Abriyah flat base fare in integer IQD. Omit to leave unchanged.

abriyah_per_km_iqd.description: New Abriyah per-kilometer fare in integer IQD. Omit to leave unchanged.

allow_women_only.description: New women-only permission flag. Omit to leave unchanged.

room_max_riders.description: New maximum riders per Abriyah room. Omit to leave unchanged.

room_max_wait_seconds.description: New maximum room-open seconds before expiry. Omit to leave unchanged.

UploadDocumentRequest.description: Persist one captain document after a presigned upload (or via a self-hosted URL).

doc_type.description:
Document type. Allowed values: "driver_license" | "car_registration" |
"captain_selfie" | "national_id_front" | "national_id_back". Any other value is rejected.

object_key.description:
Presigned-upload flow: the `object_key` returned by
`POST .../documents/upload-url` after the client PUT the image to it.
Preferred. When set, the backend stores the key and serves the document
back via a short-lived presigned GET URL.

url.description:
Legacy / bring-your-own flow: a full HTTPS URL the client already hosts.
Used only when `object_key` is absent. Storing PII this way has no
access control -- prefer the presigned-upload flow.

UpsertPreference.description:
Upsert body for `PUT /api/admin/me/preferences`. The key/value are validated
against the `AppPrefKey` allow-list in [`AppPreferencesService`].

pref_key.description:
Preference name; must be on the server allow-list (`operations.live_rooms.view`
or `captains.pending.view`). An unknown key is rejected with 400.

pref_value.description:
New value; must be one of the allowed values for `pref_key`
(`table` | `kanban` for `operations.live_rooms.view`,
`table` | `inbox` for `captains.pending.view`). An invalid value is
rejected with 400.

User.description: Rider account. Created or looked up by phone number on OTP verification.

blocked.description: True when the account is blocked by an admin and cannot request trips.

blocked_reason.description: Admin-supplied reason for the block. Null when `blocked` is false.

created_at.description: Account creation timestamp (RFC3339, UTC).

gender.description:
Gender: "m" | "f" | "unset". Stored as a DB enum, selected as text. Drives
women-only (Abriyah) eligibility; "unset" means the rider has not declared one.

name.description: Display name. Null until the rider sets it during profile completion.

phone.description:
Rider phone in normalized digits-only form (no leading '+'); the unique login
identity (OTP is sent here). Normalization strips any leading '+' and stores 10-15
ASCII digits.

photo_url.description: URL of the rider's avatar image. Null until a photo is uploaded.

updated_at.description: Last modification timestamp (RFC3339, UTC). Equals `created_at` for a brand-new row.

ValidatePinsRequest.description: Per-drag pin validation request (G-MF-03): checks pickup/dropoff fall in a serviceable zone.

zone_id.description: Optional zone hint; when provided, only that zone is checked, otherwise all active zones are searched. Null lets the engine resolve the zone.

ValidatePinsResponse.description: Per-drag pin validation result; never an HTTP error, an invalid pin returns valid=false.

message.description: Human-readable explanation shown inline in the Customer App (e.g. why the pins are out of service).

valid.description: True when both pins fall inside a serviceable zone; false otherwise.

zone_id.description: The resolved serviceable zone; null when no zone contains the pins (valid is then false).

ValidatePolygonRequest.description: Request body for the polygon-validation endpoint (POST /api/admin/zones/validate-polygon).

polygon_wkt.description: Candidate polygon as WKT, longitude first, SRID 4326: `POLYGON((lng lat, ...))`. Checked for validity without creating a zone.

valid.description: True when the submitted WKT is a closed, non-self-intersecting polygon usable as a zone boundary.

VerifyCaptainOtpRequest.description:
POST /api/auth/captain/otp/verify body. No `name` -- a captain account is
created via registration, never by the auth flow.

code.description: The plaintext one-time code the captain received; checked against the stored hash.

phone.description: International phone, with or without leading '+', 10-15 digits; must belong to an existing captain account.

VerifyOtpRequest.description: POST /api/auth/otp/verify body: redeem a rider OTP and receive a JWT.

code.description: The plaintext one-time code the rider received; checked against the stored hash.

name.description:
Optional display name set during first-time onboarding (G-MF-01).
Ignored on subsequent logins; an existing name is never overwritten.

phone.description: International phone, with or without leading '+', 10-15 digits; must match the number the OTP was sent to.

WaiveActivationRequest.description: Admin: waive a daily activation fee.

Wallet.description: A prepaid balance account belonging to one rider or captain.

balance_iqd.description: Current spendable balance in integer IQD (no decimals); never negative.

created_at.description: Wallet creation timestamp (RFC3339).

owner_id.description: Identifier of the rider or captain that owns this wallet.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last balance or metadata change (RFC3339).

WriteAuditLog.description: Internal write DTO for an audit entry (not a public endpoint body).

WriteNotificationLog.description: Internal write DTO for queuing a notification delivery record.

Zone.description:
A service zone: a PostGIS polygon (lng/lat, SRID 4326) plus per-zone Abriyah
pricing and room settings. The polygon is exchanged as WKT text.

abriyah_base_fare_iqd.description: Abriyah flat base fare in integer IQD added to the distance charge.

abriyah_per_km_iqd.description: Abriyah per-kilometer fare in integer IQD. Null for regular_only zones; always > 0 for abriyah_enabled zones.

active.description: Whether the zone is live and usable for dispatch. False once archived.

allow_women_only.description: Whether this zone permits women-only Abriyah rooms.

archived_at.description: Archival timestamp (RFC3339). Null while the zone is active.

archived_by.description: Admin user who archived the zone. Null while the zone is active.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp (RFC3339).

created_by.description: Admin user who created the zone.

edited_by.description: Admin user who last edited the zone. Null until the zone is edited after creation.

polygon_wkt.description: Zone boundary as WKT, longitude first, SRID 4326, e.g. `POLYGON((lng lat, ...))`. Read from PostGIS via `ST_AsText`.

room_max_riders.description: Maximum riders allowed per Abriyah room in this zone.

room_max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum seconds an Abriyah room stays open for matching before it expires.

updated_at.description: Last-update timestamp (RFC3339).

version.description: Optimistic-lock version; incremented on every update.

zone_type.description: Service type: "regular_only" | "abriyah_enabled". Only abriyah_enabled zones carry a per-km rate.

ZoneImportReport.description: Summary of a bulk import run, reporting how many rows were committed versus failed.

committed.description: Number of rows that validated and were inserted.

errors.description: One entry per failed row, with its position and reason.

failed.description: Number of rows that failed and were skipped.

ZoneImportRequest.description: Request wrapper for the bulk zone import endpoint (POST /api/admin/zones/import).

rows.description: Zones to import; each row is validated and committed independently (partial success allowed).

ZoneImportRow.description: A single zone to create via the bulk import endpoint. The city is resolved by name rather than id.

abriyah_base_fare_iqd.description: Abriyah flat base fare in integer IQD. Defaults to 0 when omitted; the bulk-import path does no settings lookup (unlike POST /api/admin/zones).

abriyah_per_km_iqd.description: Abriyah per-kilometer fare in integer IQD. Required and must be > 0 for abriyah_enabled rows; ignored (forced null) for regular_only rows.

active.description: Whether the zone is created active. Defaults to true when omitted.

allow_women_only.description: Whether to permit women-only Abriyah rooms. Defaults to true when omitted.

city_name.description: City name used to look up the target city; the row fails if no city matches.

polygon_wkt.description: Zone boundary as WKT, longitude first, SRID 4326. Must be a closed, valid polygon or the row fails.

room_max_riders.description: Maximum riders per Abriyah room. Defaults to 4 when omitted; the bulk-import path does no settings lookup (unlike POST /api/admin/zones).

room_max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum room-open seconds before expiry. Defaults to 300 when omitted; the bulk-import path does no settings lookup (unlike POST /api/admin/zones).

zone_type.description: Service type; must be "regular_only" or "abriyah_enabled" or the row fails.

ZoneImportRowError.description: A single failed import row and why it was rejected.

message.description: Human-readable failure reason (e.g. unknown zone_type, city not found, invalid polygon).

row.description: 1-based row index in the submitted batch.
